title: Mace PvP Textures Renewed
description: This Texture pack was created to add continuity and style to the McTiers PvP kit. This pack adds many textures that can even give you a legal advantage in PvP.
body:
This pack is designed to give you a legal competitive advantage in Mace PvP. This pack is designed with McTiers tierlist rules in mind, although all servers rules are not the same I am yet to find one where this pack would be illegal.

To get even more bang for your buck you can combine this resource pack with the "[Enchanted Maces](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchanted-maces)" resource pack.
